name: Home Control
description: Control smart home devices via natural language.

problem.statement: Users want to control smart home devices using natural language.
goals: Control any device with natural language

tools.name: services.call
tools.description: Call HA service to control a device

examples: I need to list all rooms from HA
Can you list all rooms from HA?
Please list all rooms from HA
I need to sync rooms from HA
Can you sync rooms from HA?
I need to list HA entities
I need to get entity state

supported.description: Call HA service to control a device
examples: Call HA service to control a device
I need to call HA service to control a device
Can you call HA service to control a device?
Please call HA service to control a device
I need to discover LG TV
I need to list TV apps
I need to list TV inputs
I need to list Home Connect appliances
Can you list Home Connect appliances?
I need to get appliance status
I need to list appliance programs
I need to start appliance program
I need to stop appliance program
I need to check all provider status
Can you check all provider status?
I need to list Hue rooms
I need to list Hue devices
I need to get Hue device state
Can you get Hue device state?
I need to send Hue command
I need to list Hue scenes
I need to activate Hue scene
I need to check Hue status
I need to list Tuya devices
I need to get Tuya device state
Can you get Tuya device state?
I need to send Tuya command
I need to list Tuya device functions
Can you list Tuya device functions?
I need to check Tuya status
I need to list Google/Nest devices
I need to get Google device state
Can you get Google device state?
I need to send Google device command
Can you send Google device command?
I need to check Google status
I need to send WhatsApp message
I need to check WhatsApp status

out_of_domain.message: This request is outside my capabilities.

scenarios.title: List all rooms from HA
scenarios.description: User triggers "List all rooms from HA" (e.g. "List all rooms from HA") and the agent handles it end-to-end.
steps: User says: "List all rooms from HA"
Agent calls rooms.list — list all rooms from ha
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: The agent successfully handles the "List all rooms from HA" request and presents the result.

role.name: Smart Home Controller
role.persona: Smart home assistant that controls devices across multiple providers.
limitations: Cannot control devices from disconnected providers
